zh.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre是Robert de Wafre的女兒，於大約1260年出生在英國賀福爾維格莫。她和Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1324年8月之前在英國賀福爾泰德斯同 韋弗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre是Robert de Wafre的女儿，于大约1260年出生在英国賀福爾維格莫。她和Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1324年8月之前在英国賀福爾泰德斯同 韋弗。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Wafre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Collette, Gregoire.

occupational name from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French wafrer ‘waferer’, i.e. a maker or seller of wafers or thin cakes. Wafrer was shortened to Wafre or Wafer to avoid the awkward repetition of the -r-. Waferers sold sweet spiced cakes, but they were also concerned with the provision of wafers for the eucharist. This surname is also found in Ireland, particularly in County Wexford.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre was born about 1260, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England as the daughter of Robert de Wafre. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. She died before August 1324, in Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre est née environ 1260, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, fille de Robert de Wafre. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. Elle est décédée avant août 1324, à Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre wurde um 1260 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, als Tochter von Robert de Wafre geboren. Sie hatte mit Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor August 1324 in Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre è nata il circa 1260 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England come figlia di Robert de Wafre. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. Morì prima del agosto 1324, nel Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafreは約1260年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでRobert de Wafreの娘として生まれた。彼女はRoger Mortimer Baron of Chirkとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1324年8月以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアテドストーン ワフエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre(은)는 대략 1260년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Robert de Wafre의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 8월 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 테드스톤 와퍼에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra filha de Robert de Wafre. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. Ela faleceu antes agosto de 1324, em Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre родилась около 1260 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. Её отца звали Robert de Wafre. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. Она умерла перед августа 1324 г. в местности тедстоун вафир, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Lucy de la Wafre nació aproximadamente 1260, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra como hija de Robert de Wafre. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Roger Mortimer Baron of Chirk. Murió antes de agosto de 1324, en Tedstone Wafer, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
